If Jupiter is thus eclipsed, there will be destruction of the

When Venus is thus conjoined with the eclipsed luminary,
the people of Daseraka, Kekaya, Yaudheya, Aryavarta and the
tjibi country, womenfolk, ministers and tribes will be troubled.

When Saturn joins Rahu, the people of Maru (desert), Pu?-
kara and Saur5§tra, minerals, people living in the regions of the
Arbuda mountain, people of low-castes, cowherds, and the inhabit-
ants of the Pariyatra mountain will quickly come to grief.
[In the following 12 verses effects of eclipses occurring in the
12 lunar months beginning with Karttika are described.]
